name: Fouisseur
description: Infecté qui se propage par les réseaux de métro transformés en artères palpitantes. Ses griffes creusent de nouveaux tunnels mycéliens à travers le sous-sol.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark biomechanical horror, tunneling fungal creature. Humanoid emerging from underground tunnel covered in mycelium, massive clawed hands for digging. Underground metro tunnel transformed into pulsating organic artery, walls coated in living fungal tissue. Green bioluminescent mushrooms lining tunnel ceiling. Creature halfway burrowed into wall. Spore particles floating in air. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed, underground horror.
